texto: God knows I'm not perfect, either. I've made tons of stupid mistakes, and later I regretted them. And I've done it over and over again, thousands of times; a cycle of hollow joy and vicious self-hatred. But even so, every time I learned something about myself-Misato Katsuragi
explicacao: Citação de Hideaki Anno sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “God knows I'm not perfect, either. I've made tons of stupid mistakes, and later I regretted them.…” articula sabedoria, imperfection, mistakes em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como mistakes e sin.
